authority: Local models REVIEW only; deterministic templates write all committed code; every code change was human-authored and tested.

findings.finding: Password complexity must be stringent enough to resist brute force.
findings.action: PasswordPolicy (min length + 4 char classes) + failed-login lockout already implemented and tested.

findings.finding: Proper session expiration/renewal to mitigate hijacking.
findings.action: 30-min sliding cookie expiry + HttpOnly + SameSite + SecurePolicy already configured.

findings.finding: Data encryption at rest for sensitive data.
findings.action: Documented as a deployment requirement (SQL Server TDE / column encryption). Out of local app scope; added to DEPLOYMENT security checklist and parity gaps.
CrmService (Lead/Opportunity) skeleton exists; full CRM depth is a documented parity gap.
Out of scope for a local server ERP this sprint; recorded as a future backlog item.
Query-based reports exist; BI/dashboard/print-designer is a documented ERPNext-parity gap (erp-gold-erpnext-parity-score.json).

outcome: No accepted finding contradicts the honest classification. Two new backlog items (encryption-at-rest deployment guidance, BI/analytics) recorded; the rest were already implemented or already documented as parity gaps.
